subcodes.first_line: Say: O people! He cannot be known except through Him. Behold ye Him through His own eye, O concourse of religions! The Tablets have been filled with [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا قوم انه لا یعرف بدونه ان انظروه بعینه یا ملا الادیان قد ملئت الالواح من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God
